hero.subtitle: Software Developer / AI Engineer / Embedded Systems
hero.desc: Electronics and Electrical Engineering student at IGEE Boumerdes, building intelligent systems at the intersection of embedded hardware, machine learning, and full-stack software. Based in Algeria.

about.text:
I am a second-year Electrical Engineering student at the Institute of Electronics and Electrical Engineering in Boumerdes, Algeria, with a practice-first approach to engineering. My work spans embedded systems, artificial intelligence, and full-stack development — domains I combine to build systems that are both intelligent and physically grounded.

I led the development of a real-time water quality monitoring device from concept to prototype, built an AI malware detection platform achieving 97% accuracy, and designed a cancer prediction model with 94% classification accuracy. These are not academic exercises — they are production-oriented builds driven by real constraints.

Beyond engineering, I serve as CEO and Head of Marketing at the Injaz El Djazair program and contribute as a software developer and media lead at the Intellect Scientific Club, where I bridge technical output with creative communication.

experience.role: Founder & Project CEO / Head of Marketing
experience.org: Injaz El Djazair — National Entrepreneurship Program
experience.body:
Leading a cross-functional team of 6 across strategy, development, and marketing verticals.
Overseeing product direction and go-to-market execution within Algeria's national entrepreneurship framework.
Coordinating directly with the software team to align technical architecture with business objectives.

Designing and shipping web tools and applications to improve member engagement and club operations.
Managed multi-platform media content, achieving a 30% increase in audience reach.
Bridging technical solutions with creative media strategy, including live event presentation and announcements.

projects.name: Prescan AI — Malware & Phishing Detection Platform
projects.desc: An AI-powered threat detection system that analyzes files and URLs using two specialized Random Forest classifiers trained on the EMBER 2018 dataset (150k+ samples). Includes a Docker-based isolation sandbox, REST API backend, and multilingual frontend with real-time PDF threat reports.

projects.name: AI Cancer Prediction Model
projects.desc: A machine learning pipeline that predicts cancer risk from tumor feature data. Applies systematic data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model tuning across multiple classifiers to achieve high classification confidence for clinical decision support.

projects.name: Water Quality Monitoring Device
projects.desc: Conceived and leading the full-stack development of an IoT device that monitors water quality in real time using pH and contaminant sensors. The system integrates hardware circuitry, embedded firmware, and a mobile interface for live data visualization.

projects.name: Women-Only Ride App
projects.desc: A mobile application for iOS and Android providing safe, gender-matched ride-sharing for women. The platform connects female passengers with female drivers, addressing transportation safety and trust through a purpose-built mobile experience.

certifications.name: Baccalaureate — Electrical Engineering
certifications.org: Technical High School Raid Nahnahe, Reghaia
